title: 10.40.010 - Camping on public property.
snippet: It is unlawful to camp upon any public property owned by the city, including, without limitation, streets and parks.

title: 10.40.020 - Camping on private property.
snippet: Shall not apply to persons camping upon their own land or with written consent of the owner.

title: Chapter 10.40 - UNLAWFUL CAMPING
snippet: Title amended by Ord. 2376 and Ord. No. 2598, adopted January 15, 2019.

title: 10.60.020 - Unlawful camping.
snippet: Use of automobiles, campers and trailers for human habitation on public property; overnight camping restrictions.

title: 10.60.030 - Storage of personal property on public and private property.
snippet: Unlawful for any person to store personal property, including camp paraphernalia, in specified areas except by resolution of the city council.

title: 12.32.050 - Conduct in parks and recreational areas.
snippet: Prohibits camp, occupy a camp facility, or use camp paraphernalia in parks.

title: 14-20 - Unlawful Camping.
snippet: Unlawful camping on public property; camping activities constitute a public health and safety hazard. Adds Section 14-20 to prohibit unlawful camping on public property.

title: 7-11 - Protection of Critical Infrastructure and Wildfire Risk Areas.
snippet: Unlawful and a public nuisance to camp, occupy camp facilities, or use camp paraphernalia at listed locations.

title: 7-12 - Creeks Tributaries and Riparian Areas.
snippet: Prohibits camping, occupying camp facilities, or using camp paraphernalia in creeks and riparian areas.

title: 9.14.045 - Camping prohibited without approval.
snippet: Applies whether or not person is camping or lodging within or without any automobile, van, motor home, trailer coach, or tent.

title: 12.12.030 - Prohibitions of use.
snippet: Camping without approval is prohibited by section 9.14.045 in public parks, trails and other city properties.

title: 19.50.030 - Prohibited camping on certain public property.
snippet: City may by resolution or administrative order absolutely prohibit camping, or adopt time/place/manner conditions on camping on public properties.

title: Chapter 19.50 - CAMPING ON PUBLIC PROPERTY
snippet: Ord. No. 2035 adopted May 6, 2024 repealed former Ch. 19.50 and enacted new camping-on-public-property chapter.

title: 5.60.054 - Camping in city parking garages.
snippet: Camping regulated within City of San Rafael parking garages; see SRMC chapter 19.50. (Ord. No. 2030, 7-17-2023).

title: 9.14.030 - Camping Prohibited.
snippet: Unlawful for any person to sleep, camp, occupy camp facilities, or use camp paraphernalia on any public road or public property when an alternative is available.

title: CHAPTER 9.14 - CAMPING
snippet: Dedicated camping chapter in Title 9 Safety & Conduct.

title: 12.25.030 - Park Regulations.
snippet: Camping shall be prohibited in Paradise Community Park.
